balance_factor_exceeded.misconception: You may not fully understand when and how to apply AVL rotations to restore balance after an insertion or deletion.
recommended_exercises: Practice identifying imbalance cases (LL, RR, LR, RL)

bst_violation.misconception: The BST ordering property (left < root < right) may be violated.
recommended_exercises: Verify BST property on sample trees

root_not_black.misconception: The root of a Red-Black tree must always be black.

consecutive_red.misconception: Two consecutive red nodes appeared. Red nodes cannot have red children.
recommended_exercises: Trace RB insert with recolor + rotate

unequal_black_height.misconception: All paths from root to leaves must have the same number of black nodes.
recommended_exercises: Identify which paths violate the property

heap_property_violated.misconception: The heap property (parent <= children for min-heap) is violated.

too_many_keys.misconception: A B-Tree node exceeded its maximum number of keys.
recommended_exercises: Practice splitting a full B-Tree node

unequal_leaf_depth.misconception: Not all leaves are at the same depth.
